title: Script Input
description: Metadata and text of the screenplay being analyzed. This is the entry point for the entire pipeline.

draft.description: Draft identifier (e.g., 'Clean Shooting Script', 'Rev. Blue', 'First Draft')

script_source.description: How the script content is provided

script_path.description: Path to screenplay file (if script_source is 'pdf_path')

notes.description: Any context about this draft (e.g., 'Includes blue revision pages for scenes 45-60')
